health.label: Corporate website health check
health.description: Broad structural assessment across all major sections. Checks completeness, not quality.
health.focus: Section presence, navigation completeness, content currency, document availability

investors.label: Investor relations assessment
investors.description: Deep assessment of IR content, financial communications, and investor-facing experience.
investors.focus: IR landing page completeness, results accessibility, document availability, investment case clarity, financial calendar, shareholder information

esg.label: ESG and sustainability review
esg.description: Assessment of sustainability content, reporting frameworks, and ESG messaging.
esg.focus: Sustainability framework, targets, performance data, reporting alignment, materiality, supply chain, assurance, integration with corporate narrative

careers.label: Careers and employer brand
careers.description: Assessment of employer proposition, talent attraction content, and careers experience.
careers.focus: EVP clarity, culture content, benefits, employee stories, early careers, D&I, careers platform integration

pre-pitch.label: Pre-pitch diagnostic
pre-pitch.description: Rapid assessment ahead of a new business conversation. Broad but shallow — identifies talking points and obvious gaps.
pre-pitch.focus: Positioning clarity, structural completeness, obvious gaps, conversation starters, competitive context
